records.title: Update REST API reference in deployment instructions
records.summary: Use the REST API for direct HTTP-based deployments or custom tooling. The sections below walk through a first deployment in order: set up variables, build a zip, create the agent, poll until active, and invoke it. Update.
records.change_summary: Use the REST API for direct HTTP-based deployments or custom tooling. The sections below walk through a first deployment in order: set up variables, build a zip, create the agent, poll until active, and invoke it. Update.
